title: Memory has grown to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs
author: intelkishan
summary: 文章揭示AI芯片中内存成本占比已近三分之二，凸显内存瓶颈对LLM推理、agent状态管理及RAG系统延迟/吞吐的关键制约；对用户构建生产级agent系统（尤其browser/computer-use agents需高频状态缓存）具有硬件层架构认知价值。
key_insight: AI系统性能瓶颈正从计算转向内存带宽与容量，直接影响agent state persistence、tool-use context window和RAG检索延迟。
relevance_reason: 用户P0必学项'agent engineering'和'production evaluation'需理解底层硬件约束；memory cost shift directly impacts agent-systems design (e.g., stateful LangGraph workflows) and RAG knowledge systems latency — 属于高价值上下文（P1）中'engineering architecture'的具象化案例。
